title: 10 best herbal creams for menstrual cramps
description: Viburnum opulus, also known as guelder rose, creams helps with menstrual cramps because of its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream is derived from the plant's berries, which contain salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. Salicin helps to reduce prostaglandins, hormone-like substances that cause pain and inflammation during menstruation. By applying the cream topically, it can provide localized relief from cramps, allowing women to manage their symptoms more effective...
